reviews.comment:
Paso en los próximos 15 dias y me imagino que si es del ACA son confortable y con todos los servicios

(Translated by Google)
I'll be passing through in the next 15 days and I imagine that if it's an ACA, it will be comfortable and have all the amenities.

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo el lugar.Hermoso para un pequeño descanso en la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
The place is very nice. Perfect for a short break on the road.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) We stopped for a snack and met a group of motorcyclists who had left Recife and were on their way to San Pedro de Atacama.

(Original)
Paramos para fazer um lanche e encontramos um grupo de motociclistas que saíram do Recife e estavam a caminho de San Pedro de Atacama.
